Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND bs."in.comstock_building_type" != 'Warehouse' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/94f693cdd4b3bc9f0756bfec2a433e9ab85bf20b8fd35bc2dfee598c365b78a9/2ad000bb-6346-42de-8692-bcefaac63c16/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
